focus: GenPassage feature tail parity for features 11-14
GenNestRoom crystal/protrusion randomization closer to TC4
physical cleanup of quarantined garbage recipe files while keeping registry ids for save compatibility

remaining_estimate_after_stage272.rough_stage_range: Stage320-430 depending on build fixes and renderer/model depth

known_limitations: MindSpider is still represented by a CaveSpider spawner with TC4Original breadcrumb until dedicated EntityMindSpider is ported.
Gradle compile is not run in sandbox because wrapper still needs internet access to download Gradle 7.5.1.
Some decorative TC4 block metadata variants are still flattened approximations, but no longer generic stone placeholders in key/trap/lock/cap cases.
